metadata.title: MeetingMatches – Event Networking Made Simple and Private
metadata.description: A simple and privacy-focused way for event attendees to discover each other and schedule 1-on-1 meetings.

landing.heroSubtitle: A simple and privacy-focused way for event attendees to discover each other and request 1-on-1 meetings.

secure.title: Privacy First
secure.desc: No passwords. No contact information shared. Event data is auto-deleted 24 hours after conclusion. No marketing emails.

time.title: Time and Space Control
time.desc: Hosts set schedules and locations, and meetings are automatically managed.

network.title: Frictionless Networking
network.desc: Attendees can join in 1 minute, browse profiles and send meeting requests with one click. Attendees with accepted meetings can privately chat.

createEvent.formSubtitle: Set up your matchmaking event in seconds.
createEvent.descriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of your event...
createEvent.hostEmailDesc: Required. Your admin link will be emailed here so you can always return to manage this event.
createEvent.consentSuffix: and consent to the collection of my provided information to facilitate this event. I understand all data will be automatically deleted 24 hours after the event concludes.
createEvent.retentionNote: Important: Event data will be auto-deleted 24 hours after the End Date.
createEvent.errorSuffix: Failed to create event. Please try again.

quickActions.attendeeDesc: Share the attendee link so people can register and join your event.
quickActions.adminDesc: Use this link to return to this dashboard and manage your event. We also emailed it to you.
quickActions.qrDesc: Print or display this QR code at your event so attendees can register instantly.

meetingAreas.title: Meeting Areas
meetingAreas.inputTooltip: A room or area where one or more meetings can take place

timeslots.title: Available Time Slots
timeslots.endTooltip: End Time (on same date as Start Time)

broadcast.placeholder: Type a message to all attendees...
broadcast.confirmDesc: This will send an email to all active attendees of this event. Are you sure?

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.deleteDesc: Once you delete an event, there is no going back. Please be certain. All locations, timeslots, attendees, and meetings will be permanently deleted.

deleteModal.title: Delete Event?
deleteModal.confirmQuestion: Are you sure you want to permanently delete
deleteModal.attendeesWarningSuffix: attendees attached to this event. Deleting this event will also immediately cancel all their meetings and delete their profiles permanently.

attendees.title: Attendees
attendees.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or profile text...

suspendModal.title: Suspend Attendee
suspendModal.description: Are you sure you want to suspend {{name}}? Their pending and accepted meetings will be cancelled, and they will receive an email notification. You can reinstate them at any time.

unsuspendModal.title: Reinstate Attendee
unsuspendModal.description: Reinstate {{name}}? They will be able to view and interact with other attendees again.

eventJoin.errorDesc: The event code "{{accessCode}}" is invalid or has expired.
eventJoin.timeslotsLabel: Which timeslots are you available to meet?
eventJoin.consentSuffix: and consent to my profile being visible to other attendees of this event. I understand all data is automatically deleted 24 hours after this event concludes.
eventJoin.loginHint: If you have already registered, check your email for your secure login link.
eventJoin.alreadyRegisteredError: You are already registered for this event. Please check your email for your Magic Link to log in!
eventJoin.pendingBanner: Your details have been pre-filled by the event organiser. Please review, complete your profile, and confirm your participation.

suspended.title: Your account has been suspended
suspended.message: The event host has temporarily suspended your access. You cannot view or interact with other attendees, and your meetings have been cancelled. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact the event organiser.

metPeople.title: People I've Met
metPeople.subtitle: Your confirmed connections at this event

directory.title: Attendee Directory
directory.emptyFavourites: No favourited attendees yet. Tap the heart on any profile to save them here.

reportModal.title: Report {{name}}
reportModal.description: Let the host know what happened. They'll review your report.

requestModal.title: Request Meeting
requestModal.noOverlapError: You two have no overlapping available timeslots.
requestModal.errorMissing: Error: Must select location and time.

editModal.title: Edit Profile
editModal.removeProfileBtn: Remove my profile from this event
editModal.removeConfirmWarning: This will permanently remove your profile and all your meetings. Are you sure?

bulkUpload.title: Bulk Import Attendees
bulkUpload.desc: Upload a CSV with columns: name, email, and optionally company and bio. Each person will receive an email to confirm their profile.
bulkUpload.consentLabel: I confirm I have a lawful basis (e.g. event registration, prior consent) to process the personal data in this file on behalf of these individuals.
bulkUpload.formatHint: Required columns: name, email — Optional: company, bio

declinePage.successMessage: Your data has been removed. You will not appear in this event.
declinePage.errorMessage: This invitation may have already been declined or confirmed.

cookieBanner.message: We use HTML5 Local Storage solely to keep you securely logged into your event profile. We do not use third-party tracking, advertising, or non-essential cookies. By continuing to use this site, you consent to this functional storage.
